_README: TEMPLATE starter list of target employers for direct ATS scraping. Run /setup or edit by hand. Keep the schema for each entry: name, ats, atsSlug, lane, notes. ats values: Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, Workday, iCIMS, Proprietary, Other, None. atsSlug is the company's slug on its public board (Greenhouse/Lever/Ashby only); blank = non-public ATS or no board found. The examples below are real public boards you can keep, replace, or add to.
_notes: Target employer list for direct career page / ATS scraping. ATS values: Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, Workday, iCIMS, Proprietary, Other, None. atsSlug populated for Greenhouse/Lever/Ashby; blank = uses non-public ATS or no board found.

employers.name: Example Greenhouse Co
employers.notes: Replace with a real company. atsSlug is the path segment in boards.greenhouse.io/<slug>.

employers.name: Example Lever Co
employers.notes: Replace with a real company. atsSlug is the path segment in jobs.lever.co/<slug>.

employers.name: Example Ashby Co
employers.notes: Replace with a real company. atsSlug is the path segment in jobs.ashbyhq.com/<slug>.
